heading: Prevention of deceased individuals receiving payments under farm commodity programs
label: 9093 Prevention of deceased individuals receiving payments under farm commodity programs
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 113–79128 Stat. 658Feb. 7, 2014

children.heading: Reconciliation
children.label: a Reconciliation
children.text: At least twice each year, the Secretary shall reconcile Social Security numbers of all individuals who receive payments under this chapter, whether directly or indirectly, with the Commissioner of Social Security to determine if the individuals are alive.

children.heading: Preclusion
children.label: b Preclusion
children.text: The Secretary shall preclude the issuance of payments to, and on behalf of, deceased individuals that were not eligible for payments.
